reported_items.headline: Vapi hits ~$500M valuation, wins Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
Sesame launches consumer iOS app in 39 countries with 4 agents
Deepgram Flux posts lowest end-of-speech detection latency
AssemblyAI Voice Agent API on Universal-3 Pro Streaming, 307ms P50, $4.50/hr
Gradium raises $70M seed for expressive voice models
ElevenLabs Scribe v2 Realtime: 150ms latency, 90+ languages, 93.5% accuracy; cross-lingual emotion transfer in dubbing
Garry Tan: retrieval latency is the voice-agent bottleneck; Moss does sub-10ms in-process search (open source)
OpenAI ships 3 Realtime models GA: GPT-Realtime-2 (GPT-5 reasoning, async tool calling), Translate (70+ langs), Whisper; ComplexFuncBench 66.5%
Cartesia Sonic 3.5: State Space Model, 40ms time-to-first-audio, 42 languages, $46.70/1M chars; Sonic 2 deprecated June 1
Google I/O 2026: audio glasses (fall), Docs Live voice transcription, Gemini Spark voice — voice as Google default input
FBI: $893M in AI voice-cloning scam losses in 2025; voice replicas now undetectable by ear (CNN May 29, 2026)
Quiq extends AI agent platform into production voice; cross-channel continuity (voice + messaging, no context loss)

themes.theme: Value shifting up-stack to orchestration/reliability (Vapi, LiveKit); raw TTS/STT commoditizing.
Real-time competition now on latency + function-call accuracy, not voice quality alone (OpenAI ComplexFuncBench, Cartesia SSM, Deepgram Flux).
Retrieval latency and tool-call quality co-emerging as the two named bottlenecks for voice agents.
Speech-to-speech models with async tool calling (GPT-Realtime-2) collapsing the STT->LLM->TTS chain and simplifying orchestration middleware.
Platform gravity (Google I/O hardware + productivity) compressing mid-tier consumer voice app opportunity.
Voice liveness/trust detection transitioning from compliance edge case to baseline product requirement (FBI $893M scam data).
Consumer voice apps (Sesame) testing voice-as-destination vs voice-as-feature.
Cross-channel voice+messaging continuity (Quiq) becoming enterprise expectation, not differentiator.

notes: Dedupe key = normalized headline/url. reported_items entry: {id, date, company, headline, url, type, status}. type = tech | customer_signal | founder_take | market | funding. status = new | developing | closed. themes = rolling directional observations; direction = up | down | emerging | watch.
